lockedFeatures.coatColor: gray and white bicolor cat; dense plush gray fur on head, ears, back, sides, and tail; white muzzle, chest, belly, and legs
markingPositions: gray cap covers top of head and both ears
white blaze runs from forehead/nose bridge down through muzzle
white muzzle and chin with soft rounded cheeks
large dark gray saddle across the back
irregular gray side patches near shoulders/flanks
mostly white chest, belly, front legs, rear legs, and paws
dark gray tail, visually thick and plush
lockedFeatures.tailShape: thick plush tail with rounded tip, often curved or curled close to body
lockedFeatures.bodyType: stocky rounded British Shorthair-like build; broad chest, short neck, compact legs, round paws, soft dense fur
facialFeatures: white nose bridge and muzzle dividing the gray face mask
small upright gray ears with lighter inner fur

requiredTraits: cute but preserves real pet identity
